nl_query: Scripts pending primary evaluation (evaluation_status = NOT_ASSIGNED) for Delhi Campus
failed_sql:
SELECT a.id, a.urn, a.evaluation_status, a.block_status, a.total_marks, b.name AS board_name, sa.assigned_at
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = sa.evaluator_id
JOIN   board b ON b.id = sa.board_id
WHERE  a.evaluation_status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED'
  AND  a.block_status      = 'NONE'
  AND  b.campus_id       = 'DELHI'
  AND  a.is_active        = TRUE
ORDER  BY sa.assigned_at DESC
LIMIT  200;
error:
Execution error: column sa.board_id does not exist
LINE 5: JOIN   board b ON b.id = sa.board_id
                                 ^
